# Pull Request Checklist (OctoAcme)

Use this checklist before requesting reviews or merging a PR.

- [ ] Linked issue(s) included in PR description
- [ ] PR description contains acceptance criteria and testing notes
- [ ] Targeted change is small and focused (aim for <= 400 lines of code)
- [ ] All CI checks pass (tests, lint, security scans)
- [ ] Unit and integration tests added or updated as needed
- [ ] Documentation or README updates included when behavior changes
- [ ] Feature flags or rollout notes included if applicable
- [ ] At least one reviewer assigned and at least one approval required before merge
- [ ] Merge strategy documented (squash / merge / rebase) per repo policy
- [ ] Release notes / changelog entry drafted if needed
